THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTEL, MARIE ANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4412 THIRD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124 $2,571.94 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,571.94, LEASE FORFEITED, THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT A DEFAULT JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANTS JOHN CHARLES MARTEL AND BRENDA WO ODS-ELMORE ON THE SAME TERMS AND CONDITIONS AS HAVE BEEN DESCRIBED ABOVE.
